listSearch: SELECT id, id_fluxo, name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM process WHERE active = 1 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(?1) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(?1)) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT ?2 OFFSET ?3
listAll: SELECT id, id_fluxo, name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM process WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT ?1 OFFSET ?2
countSearch: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM process WHERE active = 1 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(?1) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(?1))
countAll: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM process WHERE active = 1
listFluxes: SELECT id, name FROM flux WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY name LIMIT 200
insert: INSERT INTO process (id, id_fluxo, name, description) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4)
deactivate: UPDATE process SET active = 0, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?1
getFluxForStart: SELECT id, name, description FROM flux WHERE id = ?1 AND active = 1
listFluxStepsForStart: SELECT id_order, name FROM flux_steps WHERE id_fluxo = ?1 AND active = 1 ORDER BY id_order ASC
insertStepFromFlux: INSERT INTO process_steps (id, id_order, id_process, id_flux, name, content) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, '')
getById: SELECT * FROM process WHERE id = ?1 AND active = 1
listSteps: SELECT id, id_order, name, content, completed_at FROM process_steps WHERE id_process = ?1 ORDER BY id_order ASC
updateMeta: UPDATE process SET name = ?1, description = ?2, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?3
saveStepDraft: UPDATE process_steps SET content = ?1 WHERE id = ?2 AND id_process = ?3 AND completed_at IS NULL
completeStep: UPDATE process_steps SET content = ?1, completed_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?2 AND id_process = ?3 AND completed_at IS NULL
reopenStep: UPDATE process_steps SET completed_at = NULL WHERE id = ?1 AND id_process = ?2
touchProcess: UPDATE process SET updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?1
insertStep: INSERT INTO process_steps (id, id_order, id_process, id_flux, name, content) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)
listFilesByProcess: SELECT id, id_step, name, description, finder, mime_type, size_bytes, is_image, uploaded_at FROM process_step_files WHERE id_process = ?1 AND active = 1 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
insertProcessAuthor: INSERT INTO process_authors (id, id_process, id_fluxo, author) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4)
insertStepAuthor: INSERT INTO process_step_authors (id, id_step, id_fluxo, author) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4)
